title: Verify exact money and actuals formulas
preconditions: Canonical boundary examples including one cent, large values, refunds in later periods, transfers, inflows, invalid scales, and overflow.
steps: Round-trip all valid strings through Money and persistence representation; reject invalid strings; compute Net Account Movement, External Spend, and Budget Actual over policy matrices.
expected: No floating-point path; exact minor-unit equality for every valid case; formulas match the NFR target including negative later-period net spend and transfer exclusions.
